subject: Urgent Request: Software Engineer – Python
body:
Hi there,

I wanted to share an exciting opportunity that just came in from Vaultix, a company in the fintech space.

They are scaling their engineering team and are looking for a Software Engineer to join on a contract basis.

What they're looking for:
• Python
• Redis
• OpenAI API

Practical details:
• Start: ASAP
• Duration: 6 months
• Location: Stockholm (hybrid)
• Rate: up to 1125 SEK/h

If this sounds like a fit, or you know someone who might be – reach out!

Best regards,
Maja Gustafsson
Tech Talent Specialist
Staffbridge Nordic
Tel: +46 72 122 34 56
